prompt.content:
Update the revenue, EBITDA, and EBIT from 2025 to 2030 based on the following instructions:

Revenue is assumed to grow at a constant rate of 7.4% yoy from 2025 to 2027. After 2027, the growth rate decreases gradually by the same amount each year, reaching 5% in 2030.

Set 2025 EBITDA to 7,480. EBITDA for the forecasts should be calculated so as to maintain the same EBITDA margin as in 2025. Include a line item titled “plug” to offset the difference in EBITDA. Include a line item titled “EBITDA plug” to offset the difference in EBITDA due to EBITDA margin update.

In 2025, the EBIT margin is 13% lower than the EBITDA’s. From 2026 to 2028, the EBIT margin increases by 2% every year, then remains constant for the rest of the forecast period.

Set the Share Price and Market Cap as of December 31, 2025. The long-term growth rate should be 2.5 times smaller than the WACC. Decrease the EBITDA multiple by 15%. 

Apply the midyear adjustment to the valuation.

What is S&P Global Enterprise value, Equity value per share, and Premium / (Discount) to the share price close as of dec 31, 2025 (i) using the growth in perpetuity method and (ii) using the EBITDA multiple?

rubrics.name: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is... (ver_867ebc59fb5142d5b28244d77b544eea)

messages.content: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is $161,267 (acceptable range $159,654 to $162,880).

rubrics.name: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the growth in perpetuity... (ver_dd5c10db930a4226a89fc9059839d36c)

messages.content: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the growth in perpetuity method is $495.11 (acceptable range $490.16 to $500.06).

rubrics.name: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the EBITDA multiple method is... (ver_094d2baacad9404a847b68e6d8ab6a68)

messages.content: States the Implied Enterprise Value using the EBITDA multiple method is $140,185 (acceptable range $138,783 to $141,587).

rubrics.name: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the EBITDA multiple method is... (ver_fa55767ffdb647eea923118b7d5c76db)

messages.content: States the Implied Equity Value per share using the EBITDA multiple method is $426.24 (acceptable range $421.98 to $430.50).

rubrics.name: States the Premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the... (ver_c4b4ccc123f1492e8f6cebec0fa4edf9)

messages.content: States the Premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the growth in perpetuity approach is -5.3% (acceptable range -5.4% to -5.2%).

rubrics.name: States the Premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the... (ver_97b65875b1ff41afb682eacbd2749094)

messages.content: States the Premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the EBITDA multiple approach is -18.4% (acceptable range -18.6% to -18.2%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The Implied Enterprise Value using the growth in perpetuity method is $161,267
The Implied Equity Value per share using the growth in perpetuity method is $495.11
The premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the growth in perpetuity approach is -5.3%

The Implied Enterprise Value using the EBITDA multiple method is $140,185
The Implied Equity Value per share using the EBITDA multiple method is $426.24
The premium / (Discount) to share price as of dec 31, 2025 using the EBITDA multiple approach is -18.4%
